title: Motivation: Managing Complexity in AAA Pipelines
description: Presents the historical motivation for the frame graph: the challenge of managing hundreds of render passes with complex resource sharing in a team environment without introducing incorrect barriers, memory leaks, or resource state bugs. Wihlidal's GDC 2017 "FrameGraph":"Extensible Rendering Architecture in Frostbite" talk is dissected in detail. Students will audit a provided unstructured renderer with manual barriers for correctness, identify three barrier ordering bugs, and explain how a render graph would have prevented each one.
